generation.answer:
HDFC Equity Fund is a large-cap equity scheme that invests in large-cap companies with a focus on long-term capital appreciation. It follows a growth-oriented investment style and aims to generate returns by investing in a diversified portfolio of large-cap stocks. The fund's primary goal is to generate long-term capital appreciation.

https://www.hdfcfund.com
